import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { ReportingService } from '../services/reportingService'; import { SystemSnapshot } from '../types'; import { BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip as RechartsTooltip, ResponsiveContainer, AreaChart, Area } from 'recharts'; import { LayoutDashboard, Activity, Users, AlertTriangle, TrendingUp, DollarSign, Download, RefreshCw, Server, BrainCircuit, ShieldCheck, MessageSquare, ShieldAlert, Bot } from 'lucide-react'; import AIPlayground from './AIPlayground'; import StaffPerformanceDashboard from './StaffPerformanceDashboard'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; const IntelligenceEngine: React.FC = () => { const { user } = useAuth(); const isAdmin = user?.role === 'Admin'; const [snapshot, setSnapshot] = useState(null); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'dashboard' | 'workflow' | 'staff' | 'financial' | 'assistant'>('dashboard'); const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false); const [aiPrompt, setAiPrompt] = useState(undefined); const askAI = (prompt: string) => { setAiPrompt(prompt); setActiveTab('assistant'); setTimeout(() => setAiPrompt(undefined), 100); }; const refreshData = async () => { setIsLoading(true); const data = await ReportingService.getSystemSnapshot(); setSnapshot(data); setIsLoading(false); }; useEffect(() => { refreshData(); const handleShowAssistant = () => setActiveTab('assistant'); window.addEventListener('show_ai_assistant', handleShowAssistant); return () => window.removeEventListener('show_ai_assistant', handleShowAssistant); }, []); const handleExportReport = async () => { const csvContent = await ReportingService.generateFullSystemCSV(); const blob = new Blob([csvContent], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' }); const link = document.createElement("a"); const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); link.setAttribute("href", url); link.setAttribute("download", `GlobalWorkforce_System_Report_${new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)}.csv`); document.body.appendChild(link); link.click(); document.body.removeChild(link); }; if (!snapshot) return
Initializing Operational Analytics...

[{ id: 'financial', label: 'Financials', icon: DollarSign }] : []), { id: 'assistant', label: 'AI Assistant', icon: Bot }, ].map(tab => ( ))}

Error: Calling setState synchronously within an effect can trigger cascading renders

Effects are intended to synchronize state between React and external systems such as manually updating the DOM, state management libraries, or other platform APIs. In general, the body of an effect should do one or both of the following:
* Update external systems with the latest state from React.
* Subscribe for updates from some external system, calling setState in a callback function when external state changes.

Calling setState synchronously within an effect body causes cascading renders that can hurt performance, and is not recommended. (https://react.dev/learn/you-might-not-need-an-effect).

messages.message:
Error: Calling setState synchronously within an effect can trigger cascading renders

Effects are intended to synchronize state between React and external systems such as manually updating the DOM, state management libraries, or other platform APIs. In general, the body of an effect should do one or both of the following:
* Update external systems with the latest state from React.
* Subscribe for updates from some external system, calling setState in a callback function when external state changes.

Calling setState synchronously within an effect body causes cascading renders that can hurt performance, and is not recommended. (https://react.dev/learn/you-might-not-need-an-effect).

import { Candidate, DocumentType, DocumentStatus, WorkflowStage, MedicalStatus, PassportStatus, PCCStatus } from '../types';

export const convertToCSV = (objArray: any[]) => {
    if (!objArray || objArray.length === 0) return '';

    const candidates: Candidate[] = typeof objArray !== 'object' ? JSON.parse(objArray) : objArray;
    let str = '';

    // Define all headers covering every aspect of the Candidate interface
    const headers = [
        // System / Core
        'System: ID',
        'System: Candidate Code',
        'System: Audit Created At',
        'System: Audit Created By',
        'System: Audit Updated At',
        'System: Audit Updated By',
        'System: Avatar URL',

        // Critical Workflow
        'Workflow: Status',
        'Workflow: Stage',
        'Workflow: Stage Status',
        'Workflow: Profile Completion %',
        'Workflow: Registration Source',
        'Workflow: Risk Score',
        'Workflow: SLA Status',
        'Workflow: Days in Stage',

        // Personal Information (Detailed)
        'Personal: Full Name',
        'Personal: First Name',
        'Personal: Middle Name',
        // 'Personal: Last Name', // Removed
        'Personal: NIC',
        'Personal: Date of Birth',
        'Personal: Age',
        'Personal: Gender',
        'Personal: Marital Status',
        'Personal: Religion',
        'Personal: Nationality',
        'Personal: Civil Status',
        'Personal: Screen Name',

        // Family Details
        'Family: Spouse Name',
        'Family: Father Name',
        'Family: Mother Name',
        'Family: Children Count',
        'Family: Children Details', // JSON stringified or joined
        'Family: Guardian Name',
        'Family: Guardian ID',
        'Family: Guardian Contact',
        'Family: Guardian Birthday',

        // Contact Information
        'Contact: Primary Phone',
        'Contact: Whatsapp',
        'Contact: Secondary Phone',
        'Contact: Additional Phones',
        'Contact: Email',
        'Contact: Secondary Email',

        // Address
        'Address: Current Address',
        'Address: City',
        'Address: District',
        'Address: Province',
        'Address: GS Division',
        'Address: Divisional Secretariat',

        // Physical Attributes
        'Physical: Height (Feet)',
        'Physical: Height (Inches)',
        'Physical: Weight (kg)',

        // Professional Profile
        'Professional: Job Roles',
        'Professional: Role',
        'Professional: Experience (Years)',
        'Professional: Skills',
        'Professional: Education Levels',
        'Professional: School',
        'Professional: O/L Year',
        'Professional: A/L Year',
        'Professional: Training Details',
        'Professional: Special Achievements',
        'Professional: Educational Qualifications', // Detailed string
        'Professional: Employment History', // Detailed string

        // Preferences & Job
        'Job: Preferred Countries',
        'Job: Target Country',
        'Job: Assigned Job ID',
        'Job: Assigned Employer ID',
        'Job: Application Date',
        'Job: Office Selection',
        'Job: Office Remark',
        'Job: Reference No',

        // Emergency Contact
        'Emergency: Name',
        'Emergency: Relation',
        'Emergency: Phone',
        'Emergency: Address',

        // Passport Data (Primary)
        'Passport: Number',
        'Passport: Issued Date',
        'Passport: Expiry Date',
        'Passport: Country',
        'Passport: Status',
        'Passport: Validity Days',
        'Passport: All Passports', // List of other passports

        // Medical Data
        'Medical: Status',
        'Medical: Scheduled Date',
        'Medical: Completed Date',
        'Medical: Blood Group',
        'Medical: Allergies',
        'Medical: Notes',
        'Medical: Records Summary',

        // Police Clearance (PCC)
        'PCC: Status',
        'PCC: Issued Date',
        'PCC: Expiry Date',
        'PCC: Age (Days)',
        'PCC: Last Inspection',

        // Driving License
        'Driving: License No',

        // SLBFE Data
        'SLBFE: Registration Number',
        'SLBFE: Registration Date',
        'SLBFE: Training Date',
        'SLBFE: Training Institute',
        'SLBFE: Certificate No',
        'SLBFE: Insurance Provider',
        'SLBFE: Insurance Policy No',
        'SLBFE: Insurance Expiry',
        'SLBFE: Insurance Premium',
        'SLBFE: Biometric Status',
        'SLBFE: Job Order ID',
        'SLBFE: Agreement ID',
        'SLBFE: Agreement Status',
        'SLBFE: Deployment Approval Date',

        // Family Consent
        'Consent: Is Given',
        'Consent: Signatory Name',
        'Consent: Relation',
        'Consent: Verified By',
        'Consent: Verification Date',

        // Documents
        'Documents: Missing Count',
        'Documents: Missing List',
        'Documents: Rejected Count',
        'Documents: Rejected List',
        'Documents: Total Uploaded',

        // Stage Data Specifics
        'Stage Data: Medical Status',
        'Stage Data: Police Status',
        'Stage Data: Visa Status',
        'Stage Data: Employer Status',
        'Stage Data: Ticket Status',
        'Stage Data: Payment Status',
        'Stage Data: Payment Notes'
    ];

    str += headers.join(',') + '\r\n';

    for (const candidate of candidates) {
        // --- PRE-CALCULATIONS & EXTRACTIONS ---

        // Missing/Rejected Documents
        const validDocs = candidate.documents || [];
        const missingDocs = validDocs.filter((d: any) => d.status === DocumentStatus.MISSING);
        const rejectedDocs = validDocs.filter((d: any) => d.status === DocumentStatus.REJECTED || d.status === DocumentStatus.CORRECTION_REQUIRED);

        // Risk & SLA (Logic from previous implementation / ReportService)
        const missingInfoFields: string[] = [];
        if (!candidate.nic) missingInfoFields.push('NIC');
        if (!candidate.personalInfo?.dob && !candidate.dob) missingInfoFields.push('DOB');

        const entryDate = new Date(candidate.stageEnteredAt || new Date().toISOString());
        const now = new Date();
        const daysInStage = Math.floor((now.getTime() - entryDate.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
        const slaStatus = daysInStage > 14 ? 'CRITICAL' : daysInStage > 7 ? 'WARNING' : 'ON_TRACK';

        const riskPoints = (missingInfoFields.length * 2) + (rejectedDocs.length * 3) + (missingDocs.length * 1) + (slaStatus === 'CRITICAL' ? 10 : 0);
        const riskScore = riskPoints > 15 ? 'HIGH' : riskPoints > 5 ? 'MEDIUM' : 'LOW';

        // Helpers for complex fields
        const formatDate = (dateString?: string) => dateString ? new Date(dateString).toISOString().split('T')[0] : '';
        const escapeCsv = (val: any) => {
            if (val === null || val === undefined) return '';
            const stringVal = String(val);
            if (stringVal.includes(',') || stringVal.includes('"') || stringVal.includes('\n')) {
                return `"${stringVal.replace(/"/g, '""')}"`;
            }
            return stringVal;
        };
        const formatList = (list?: any[]) => list ? list.map(i => typeof i === 'object' ? JSON.stringify(i) : i).join('; ') : '';

        // --- MAPPING VALUES ---
        const row = [
            // System
            candidate.id,
            candidate.candidateCode,
            candidate.audit?.createdAt,
            candidate.audit?.createdBy,
            candidate.audit?.updatedAt,
            candidate.audit?.updatedBy,
            candidate.avatarUrl,

            // Workflow
            candidate.profileCompletionStatus,
            candidate.stage,
            candidate.stageStatus,
            candidate.profileCompletionPercentage,
            candidate.registrationSource,
            riskScore,
            slaStatus,
            daysInStage,

            // Personal Info (Flattened from root + personalInfo object)
            // Priority to personalInfo object, fallback to root legacy fields
            candidate.personalInfo?.fullName || candidate.name,
            candidate.personalInfo?.firstName || candidate.firstName,
            candidate.personalInfo?.middleName || candidate.middleName,
            // Removed lastName as it is not in the interface
            candidate.personalInfo?.nic || candidate.nic,
            formatDate(candidate.personalInfo?.dob || candidate.dob),
            candidate.personalInfo?.age,
            candidate.personalInfo?.gender || candidate.gender,
            candidate.personalInfo?.maritalStatus || candidate.maritalStatus,
            candidate.personalInfo?.religion || candidate.religion,
            candidate.personalInfo?.nationality || candidate.nationality,
            candidate.personalInfo?.civilStatus,
            (candidate.personalInfo as any)?.screenName, // Type assertion if not in main interface but in data

            // Family
            candidate.personalInfo?.spouseName || candidate.spouseName,
            candidate.personalInfo?.fatherName || candidate.fatherName,
            candidate.personalInfo?.motherName || candidate.motherName,
            candidate.personalInfo?.children?.length || candidate.numberOfChildren || 0,
            JSON.stringify(candidate.personalInfo?.children || candidate.children || []),
            candidate.guardianName, // Legacy root
            candidate.guardianIdNo,
            candidate.guardianContact,
            formatDate(candidate.guardianBirthday),

            // Contact
            candidate.contactInfo?.primaryPhone || candidate.phone,
            candidate.contactInfo?.whatsappPhone || candidate.whatsapp,
            candidate.contactInfo?.additionalPhones ? candidate.contactInfo.additionalPhones.join('; ') : candidate.secondaryPhone,
            formatList(candidate.additionalContactNumbers),
            candidate.contactInfo?.email || candidate.email,
            candidate.secondaryEmail,

            // Address
            candidate.personalInfo?.address || candidate.address,
            candidate.personalInfo?.city || candidate.city,
            candidate.personalInfo?.district || candidate.district,
            candidate.personalInfo?.province || candidate.province,
            candidate.personalInfo?.gsDivision || candidate.gsDivision,
            candidate.personalInfo?.divisionalSecretariat || candidate.divisionalSecretariat,

            // Physical
            candidate.personalInfo?.height?.feet || candidate.height?.feet,
            candidate.personalInfo?.height?.inches || candidate.height?.inches,
            candidate.personalInfo?.weight || candidate.weight,

            // Professional
            formatList(candidate.professionalProfile?.jobRoles || candidate.jobRoles),
            candidate.role || candidate.professionalProfile?.jobRoles?.[0] || '', // Primary role
            candidate.professionalProfile?.experienceYears || candidate.experienceYears,
            formatList(candidate.professionalProfile?.skills || candidate.skills),
            formatList(candidate.professionalProfile?.education || candidate.education),
            candidate.professionalProfile?.school || candidate.school,
            candidate.professionalProfile?.gceOL?.year || candidate.gceOL?.year,
            candidate.professionalProfile?.gceAL?.year || candidate.gceAL?.year,
            candidate.professionalProfile?.trainingDetails || candidate.trainingDetails,
            candidate.professionalProfile?.specialAchievements || candidate.specialAchievements,
            // Complex objects JSON stringified for safety
            JSON.stringify(candidate.professionalProfile?.educationalQualifications || candidate.educationalQualifications || []),
            JSON.stringify(candidate.professionalProfile?.employmentHistory || candidate.employmentHistory || []),

            // Preferences & Job
            formatList(candidate.preferredCountries),
            candidate.targetCountry || candidate.country,
            candidate.jobId,
            candidate.employerId,
            formatDate(candidate.applicationDate),
            candidate.officeSelection,
            candidate.officeRemark,
            candidate.refNo,

            // Emergency
            candidate.contactInfo?.emergencyContact?.name,
            candidate.contactInfo?.emergencyContact?.relation,
            candidate.contactInfo?.emergencyContact?.phone,
            candidate.contactInfo?.emergencyContact?.address,

            // Passport (Primary)
            candidate.passportData?.passportNumber,
            formatDate(candidate.passportData?.issuedDate),
            formatDate(candidate.passportData?.expiryDate),
            candidate.passportData?.country,
            candidate.passportData?.status,
            candidate.passportData?.validityDays,
            JSON.stringify(candidate.passports || []),

            // Medical
            candidate.medicalData?.status,
            formatDate(candidate.medicalData?.scheduledDate),
            formatDate(candidate.medicalData?.completedDate),
            candidate.medicalData?.bloodGroup,
            candidate.medicalData?.allergies,
            candidate.medicalData?.notes,
            JSON.stringify(candidate.medicalData?.medicalRecords || []),

            // PCC
            candidate.pccData?.status,
            formatDate(candidate.pccData?.issuedDate),
            formatDate(candidate.pccData?.expiryDate),
            candidate.pccData?.ageDays,
            formatDate(candidate.pccData?.lastInspectionDate),

            // Driving
            candidate.personalInfo?.drivingLicenseNo || candidate.drivingLicenseNo,

            // SLBFE
            candidate.slbfeData?.registrationNumber,
            formatDate(candidate.slbfeData?.registrationDate),
            formatDate(candidate.slbfeData?.trainingDate),
            candidate.slbfeData?.trainingInstitute,
            candidate.slbfeData?.trainingCertificateNo,
            candidate.slbfeData?.insuranceProvider,
            candidate.slbfeData?.insurancePolicyNumber,
            formatDate(candidate.slbfeData?.insuranceExpiryDate),
            candidate.slbfeData?.insurancePremium,
            candidate.slbfeData?.biometricStatus,
            candidate.slbfeData?.jobOrderId || candidate.jobOrderId,
            candidate.slbfeData?.agreementId,
            candidate.slbfeData?.agreementStatus,
            formatDate(candidate.slbfeData?.deploymentApprovalDate),

            // Family Consent
            candidate.slbfeData?.familyConsent?.isGiven ? 'Yes' : 'No',
            candidate.slbfeData?.familyConsent?.signatoryName,
            candidate.slbfeData?.familyConsent?.signatoryRelation,
            candidate.slbfeData?.familyConsent?.verifiedBy,
            formatDate(candidate.slbfeData?.familyConsent?.verificationDate),

            // Documents
            missingDocs.length,
            missingDocs.map((d: any) => d.type).join('; '),
            rejectedDocs.length,
            rejectedDocs.map((d: any) => d.type).join('; '),
            candidate.documents ? candidate.documents.length : 0,

            // Stage Data
            candidate.stageData?.medicalStatus,
            candidate.stageData?.policeStatus,
            candidate.stageData?.visaStatus,
            candidate.stageData?.employerStatus,
            candidate.stageData?.ticketStatus,
            candidate.stageData?.paymentStatus,
            candidate.stageData?.paymentNotes
        ];

        str += row.map(escapeCsv).join(',') + '\r\n';
    }

    return str;
};

import React from 'react';
import { Document, Page, Text, View, Image } from '@react-pdf/renderer';
import { styles } from './styles';
import { Candidate, AdvancePayment } from '@/types';
import { SystemReport } from '../../../services/reportService';
import logo from './logo_suhara.jpg';

interface CandidateReportPDFProps {
    candidate: Candidate;
    reportId: string;
    generatedBy: string;
    systemReport?: SystemReport;
}

const TableRow = ({ label, value, colSpan = 1, isLast = false, isAlert = false, isSuccess = false, isBold = false }: any) => {
    const valueStyle = [
        styles.tableCellValue,
        colSpan === 3 ? styles.colFull : undefined,
        colSpan === 2 ? styles.colHalf : undefined,
        isLast ? styles.lastCell : undefined,
        isAlert ? styles.alertText : undefined,
        isSuccess ? styles.successText : undefined,
        isBold ? styles.boldValue : undefined
    ].filter(Boolean) as any;
    return (
        <>
            <View style={styles.tableCellLabel}><Text>{label}</Text></View>
            <View style={valueStyle}><Text>{value || 'N/A'}</Text></View>
        </>
    );
};

export const CandidateReportPDF: React.FC<CandidateReportPDFProps> = ({ candidate, reportId, generatedBy, systemReport }) => {

    const Header = () => (
        <View style={styles.headerContainer} fixed>
            <Image src={logo} style={styles.logo} />
            <View style={styles.headerText}>
                <View style={{ alignItems: 'flex-end', marginBottom: 6 }}>
                    {candidate.complianceFlags?.some(f => !f.isResolved && f.severity === 'CRITICAL') ? (
                        <View style={{ backgroundColor: '#fef2f2', padding: '2 6', borderRadius: 2, border: '1 solid #ef4444' }}>
                            <Text style={{ fontSize: 7, fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold', color: '#dc2626' }}>CRITICAL COMPLIANCE ISSUE</Text>
                        </View>
                    ) : (candidate.complianceFlags && candidate.complianceFlags.some(f => !f.isResolved)) ? (
                        <View style={{ backgroundColor: '#fffbeb', padding: '2 6', borderRadius: 2, border: '1 solid #f59e0b' }}>
                            <Text style={{ fontSize: 7, fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold', color: '#b45309' }}>COMPLIANCE WARNING</Text>
                        </View>
                    ) : (
                        <View style={{ backgroundColor: '#f0fdf4', padding: '2 6', borderRadius: 2, border: '1 solid #22c55e' }}>
                            <Text style={{ fontSize: 7, fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold', color: '#16a34a' }}>VERIFIED COMPLIANT</Text>
                        </View>
                    )}
                </View>
                <Text style={styles.docTitle}>Candidate Status Report</Text>
                <Text style={styles.docMetaBold}>REG NO: {candidate.regNo || candidate.candidateCode}</Text>
                <Text style={styles.docMeta}>CODE: {candidate.candidateCode} | GEN: {new Date().toLocaleString()}</Text>
                <Text style={styles.docMeta}>REPORT ID: {reportId}</Text>
            </View>
        </View>
    );

    const Footer = () => (
        <View style={styles.footer} fixed>
            <Text style={styles.footerText}>CONFIDENTIAL</Text>
            <Text style={styles.footerText} render={({ pageNumber, totalPages }) => (`PAGE ${pageNumber} OF ${totalPages}`)} />
            <Text style={styles.footerText}>GENERATED BY: {generatedBy.toUpperCase()}</Text>
        </View>
    );

    const Watermark = () => (
        <Image src={logo} style={styles.watermark} fixed />
    );

    return (
        <Document>
            <Page size="A4" style={styles.page}>
                <Header />
                <Footer />
                <Watermark />

                {/* 1. Registration Details */}
                <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>1. Registration Details</Text>
                <View style={styles.table}>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="System ID" value={candidate.id} />
                        <TableRow label="Candidate Code" value={candidate.candidateCode} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="REG NO." value={candidate.regNo} isBold />
                        <TableRow label="Registration Date" value={candidate.regDate ? new Date(candidate.regDate).toLocaleDateString() : ''} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Assigned Stage" value={candidate.stage} isAlert={candidate.stageStatus === 'Rejected' || candidate.stageStatus === 'Cancelled'} />
                        <TableRow label="Stage Status" value={candidate.stageStatus} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Stage Date" value={candidate.stageEnteredAt ? new Date(candidate.stageEnteredAt).toLocaleString() : 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="Profile Type" value={`${candidate.profileType || 'N/A'} (${candidate.profileCompletionPercentage || 0}%)`} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Coordinator" value={candidate.coordinatorName} />
                        <TableRow label="Document Officer" value={candidate.dhOfficer} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Foreign Agent" value={candidate.foreignAgent} />
                        <TableRow label="Company" value={candidate.companyName} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Batch Reference" value={candidate.batchReference} />
                        <TableRow label="Ref No" value={candidate.refNo} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Office Officer" value={candidate.officeUseOnly?.customerCareOfficer} />
                        <TableRow label="File Officer" value={candidate.officeUseOnly?.fileHandlingOfficer} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Office Charges" value={candidate.officeUseOnly?.charges} />
                        <TableRow label="Office Date" value={candidate.officeUseOnly?.date} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Application Date" value={candidate.applicationDate ? new Date(candidate.applicationDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="Office Selection" value={candidate.officeSelection} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Office Remark" value={candidate.officeRemark} />
                        <TableRow label="Notes" value={candidate.notes} isLast />
                    </View>
                </View>

                {/* 2. PRIMARY IDENTITY MATRIX */}
                <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>2. Personal Information</Text>
                <View style={styles.table}>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Full Name" value={candidate.personalInfo?.fullName || candidate.name} colSpan={3} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="First Name" value={candidate.personalInfo?.firstName || candidate.firstName} />
                        <TableRow label="Surname" value={candidate.personalInfo?.surname || candidate.surname} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Middle Name" value={candidate.personalInfo?.middleName || candidate.middleName} />
                        <TableRow label="Other Names" value={candidate.personalInfo?.otherNames || candidate.otherNames} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="NIC" value={candidate.personalInfo?.nic || candidate.nic} />
                        <TableRow label="Date of Birth" value={`${candidate.personalInfo?.dob || candidate.dob || 'N/A'} (${candidate.personalInfo?.age || 'N/A'} yrs)`} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Gender / Marital" value={`${candidate.personalInfo?.gender || candidate.gender || 'N/A'} / ${candidate.personalInfo?.maritalStatus || candidate.personalInfo?.civilStatus || candidate.maritalStatus || 'N/A'}`} />
                        <TableRow label="Nationality" value={`${candidate.personalInfo?.nationality || candidate.nationality || 'N/A'} / ${candidate.personalInfo?.religion || candidate.religion || 'N/A'}`} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Height / Weight" value={`${candidate.personalInfo?.height?.feet || 0}'${candidate.personalInfo?.height?.inches || 0}" / ${candidate.personalInfo?.weight || '-'} kg`} />
                        <TableRow label="Driving License" value={candidate.personalInfo?.drivingLicenseNo || candidate.drivingLicenseNo || 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                </View>

                {/* 3. COMMUNICATION & TRACEABILITY */}
                <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>3. Contact Details</Text>
                <View style={styles.table}>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Phone" value={candidate.contactInfo?.primaryPhone || candidate.phone} />
                        <TableRow label="WhatsApp" value={candidate.contactInfo?.whatsappPhone || candidate.whatsapp || 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Secondary Phone" value={candidate.secondaryPhone} />
                        <TableRow label="Other Phones" value={candidate.contactInfo?.additionalPhones?.join(', ') || candidate.additionalContactNumbers?.join(', ')} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Email" value={candidate.contactInfo?.email || candidate.email} />
                        <TableRow label="Secondary Email" value={candidate.secondaryEmail} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Address" value={candidate.personalInfo?.address || candidate.address} colSpan={3} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="City / Province" value={`${candidate.personalInfo?.city || candidate.city || 'N/A'} / ${candidate.personalInfo?.province || candidate.province || 'N/A'}`} />
                        <TableRow label="District" value={candidate.personalInfo?.district || candidate.district || 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="GS Division" value={`${candidate.personalInfo?.gsDivision || candidate.gsDivision || 'N/A'} / ${candidate.personalInfo?.divisionalSecretariat || candidate.divisionalSecretariat || 'N/A'}`} colSpan={3} isLast />
                    </View>
                </View>

                {/* 4. Family & Emergency */}
                <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>4. Family & Emergency</Text>
                <View style={styles.table}>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Emergency Contact" value={`${candidate.contactInfo?.emergencyContact?.name || 'N/A'} (${candidate.contactInfo?.emergencyContact?.relation || 'N/A'}) - ${candidate.contactInfo?.emergencyContact?.phone || 'N/A'}`} colSpan={3} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Emergency Address" value={candidate.contactInfo?.emergencyContact?.address} colSpan={3} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Father" value={`${candidate.personalInfo?.fatherName || candidate.fatherName || 'N/A'}${candidate.fatherAge ? ' (Age: ' + candidate.fatherAge + ')' : ''}${candidate.fatherNic ? ' NIC: ' + candidate.fatherNic : ''}`} colSpan={3} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Mother" value={`${candidate.personalInfo?.motherName || candidate.motherName || 'N/A'}${candidate.motherAge ? ' (Age: ' + candidate.motherAge + ')' : ''}${candidate.motherNic ? ' NIC: ' + candidate.motherNic : ''}`} colSpan={3} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Spouse" value={`${candidate.personalInfo?.spouseName || candidate.spouseName || 'N/A'}${candidate.spouseAge ? ' (Age: ' + candidate.spouseAge + ')' : ''}${candidate.spouseNic ? ' NIC: ' + candidate.spouseNic : ''}`} />
                        <TableRow label="Children" value={candidate.personalInfo?.children?.length || candidate.numberOfChildren || '0'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Guardian" value={`${candidate.guardianName || 'N/A'} (ID: ${candidate.guardianIdNo || 'N/A'}) - ${candidate.guardianContact || 'N/A'}`} colSpan={3} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Guardian DOB" value={candidate.guardianBirthday} colSpan={3} isLast />
                    </View>
                </View>

            </Page>

            <Page size="A4" style={styles.page}>
                <Header />
                <Footer />
                <Watermark />

                {/* 5. Passport Details */}
                <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>5. Passport Details</Text>
                <View style={styles.table}>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Passport Number" value={candidate.passportData?.passportNumber} />
                        <TableRow label="Issue Date" value={candidate.passportData?.issuedDate ? new Date(candidate.passportData.issuedDate).toLocaleDateString() : ''} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Issuing Country" value={candidate.passportData?.country} />
                        <TableRow label="Expiry Date" value={candidate.passportData?.expiryDate ? new Date(candidate.passportData.expiryDate).toLocaleDateString() : ''} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Place of Birth" value={candidate.personalInfo?.placeOfBirth || candidate.placeOfBirth || 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="Profession" value={candidate.personalInfo?.passportProfession || candidate.passportProfession || 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Passport Status" value={candidate.passportData?.status} isSuccess={candidate.passportData?.status === 'VALID'} isAlert={candidate.passportData?.status === 'EXPIRED'} />
                        <TableRow label="Validity Days" value={candidate.passportData?.validityDays != null ? `${candidate.passportData.validityDays} days` : 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Passport Remark" value={candidate.passportRemark} colSpan={3} isLast />
                    </View>
                </View>

                {/* 6. Work & Education */}
                <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>6. Work & Education</Text>
                <View style={styles.table}>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow
                            label="Job Roles"
                            value={(candidate.professionalProfile?.jobRoles || candidate.jobRoles || [])
                                .map(role => typeof role === 'string' ? role : `${role.title} (${role.experienceYears}y - ${role.skillLevel})`)
                                .join(', ')}
                            colSpan={3}
                            isLast
                        />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Experience" value={`${candidate.professionalProfile?.experienceYears || candidate.experienceYears || '0'} years`} />
                        <TableRow label="Target Country" value={candidate.targetCountry || candidate.preferredCountries?.join(', ') || 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Education" value={candidate.professionalProfile?.education?.join(', ') || candidate.education?.join(', ')} colSpan={3} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="School" value={candidate.professionalProfile?.school || candidate.personalInfo?.school || candidate.school} />
                        <TableRow label="GCE O/L Year" value={candidate.professionalProfile?.gceOL?.year || candidate.gceOL?.year} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="GCE A/L Year" value={candidate.professionalProfile?.gceAL?.year || candidate.gceAL?.year} />
                        <TableRow label="Achievements" value={candidate.professionalProfile?.specialAchievements || candidate.specialAchievements} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Training" value={candidate.professionalProfile?.trainingDetails || candidate.trainingDetails} colSpan={3} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Skills" value={candidate.professionalProfile?.skills?.join(', ') || candidate.skills?.join(', ')} colSpan={3} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Preferred Countries" value={candidate.preferredCountries?.join(', ')} colSpan={3} isLast />
                    </View>
                </View>

                {/* 6b. Employment History */}
                {(candidate.professionalProfile?.employmentHistory?.length || candidate.employmentHistory?.length) ? (
                    <>
                        <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>6b. Employment History</Text>
                        <View style={styles.table}>
                            <View style={[styles.tableRow, styles.tableHeader]}>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Type</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '25%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Position</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '25%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Company</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Country</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '20%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>Years</Text>
                            </View>
                            {(candidate.professionalProfile?.employmentHistory || candidate.employmentHistory || []).map((emp: any, i: number) => (
                                <View style={styles.tableRow} key={i}>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%' }]}>{emp.type || '-'}</Text>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '25%' }]}>{emp.position || '-'}</Text>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '25%' }]}>{emp.companyName || '-'}</Text>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%' }]}>{emp.country || '-'}</Text>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '20%', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>{emp.years || '-'}</Text>
                                </View>
                            ))}
                        </View>
                    </>
                ) : null}

                {/* 6c. Educational Qualifications */}
                {(candidate.professionalProfile?.educationalQualifications?.length || candidate.educationalQualifications?.length) ? (
                    <>
                        <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>6c. Qualifications</Text>
                        <View style={styles.table}>
                            <View style={[styles.tableRow, styles.tableHeader]}>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '30%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Course</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '20%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Level</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '30%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Institute</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '20%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>Year</Text>
                            </View>
                            {(candidate.professionalProfile?.educationalQualifications || candidate.educationalQualifications || []).map((eq: any, i: number) => (
                                <View style={styles.tableRow} key={i}>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '30%' }]}>{eq.courseName || '-'}</Text>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '20%' }]}>{eq.level || '-'}</Text>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '30%' }]}>{eq.institute || '-'}</Text>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '20%', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>{eq.year || '-'}</Text>
                                </View>
                            ))}
                        </View>
                    </>
                ) : null}

                {/* 7. Medical & Clearance */}
                <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>7. Medical & Clearance</Text>
                <View style={styles.table}>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Medical Status" value={candidate.medicalData?.status || 'N/A'} isSuccess={candidate.medicalData?.status === 'Completed'} isAlert={candidate.medicalData?.status === 'Failed'} />
                        <TableRow label="Medical Expiry" value={candidate.medicalData?.medicalRecords?.[0]?.expiryDate ? new Date(candidate.medicalData.medicalRecords[0].expiryDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Blood Group" value={candidate.medicalData?.bloodGroup} />
                        <TableRow label="Allergies" value={candidate.medicalData?.allergies} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Scheduled Date" value={candidate.medicalData?.scheduledDate ? new Date(candidate.medicalData.scheduledDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="Completed Date" value={candidate.medicalData?.completedDate ? new Date(candidate.medicalData.completedDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Medical Notes" value={candidate.medicalData?.notes} colSpan={3} isLast />
                    </View>
                </View>

                {/* 7b. All Medical Records */}
                {candidate.medicalData?.medicalRecords && candidate.medicalData.medicalRecords.length > 0 ? (
                    <>
                        <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>7b. Medical Records</Text>
                        <View style={styles.table}>
                            <View style={[styles.tableRow, styles.tableHeader]}>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Date</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Type</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Result</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '20%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Clinic</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Expiry</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '20%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>Notes</Text>
                            </View>
                            {candidate.medicalData.medicalRecords.map((rec, i) => (
                                <View style={styles.tableRow} key={i}>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%' }]}>{rec.date ? new Date(rec.date).toLocaleDateString() : '-'}</Text>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%' }]}>{rec.type || '-'}</Text>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%', color: rec.result === 'Pass' ? '#16a34a' : rec.result === 'Fail' ? '#dc2626' : '#0f172a' }]}>{rec.result || '-'}</Text>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '20%' }]}>{rec.clinic || '-'}</Text>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%' }]}>{rec.expiryDate ? new Date(rec.expiryDate).toLocaleDateString() : '-'}</Text>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '20%', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>{rec.notes || '-'}</Text>
                                </View>
                            ))}
                        </View>
                    </>
                ) : null}

                <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>7c. Police & Security Clearance</Text>
                <View style={styles.table}>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Police Report" value={candidate.stageData?.policeStatus || 'N/A'} isSuccess={candidate.stageData?.policeStatus === 'Issued'} />
                        <TableRow label="PCC Expiry" value={candidate.pccData?.expiryDate ? new Date(candidate.pccData.expiryDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="PCC Issued" value={candidate.pccData?.issuedDate ? new Date(candidate.pccData.issuedDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="PCC Status" value={candidate.pccData?.status} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="PCC Check" value={candidate.pccData?.lastInspectionDate ? new Date(candidate.pccData.lastInspectionDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="PCC Age" value={candidate.pccData?.ageDays != null ? `${candidate.pccData.ageDays} days` : 'N/A'} isLast />

                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Biometric" value={candidate.slbfeData?.biometricStatus || 'N/A'} isSuccess={candidate.slbfeData?.biometricStatus === 'Completed'} />
                        <TableRow label="Family Consent" value={candidate.slbfeData?.familyConsent?.isGiven ? 'Verified' : 'Pending'} isSuccess={candidate.slbfeData?.familyConsent?.isGiven === true} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Consent By" value={`${candidate.slbfeData?.familyConsent?.signatoryName || 'N/A'} (${candidate.slbfeData?.familyConsent?.signatoryRelation || 'N/A'})`} />
                        <TableRow label="Verified" value={candidate.slbfeData?.familyConsent?.verifiedBy ? `${candidate.slbfeData.familyConsent.verifiedBy} ${candidate.slbfeData.familyConsent.verificationDate ? 'on ' + candidate.slbfeData.familyConsent.verificationDate : ''}` : 'Pending'} isLast />
                    </View>
                </View>

                {/* 8. Embassy & Visa */}
                <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>8. Embassy & Visa</Text>
                <View style={styles.table}>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="E No / SE No" value={`${candidate.embassyDetails?.eNo || 'N/A'} / ${candidate.embassyDetails?.seNo || 'N/A'}`} />
                        <TableRow label="Applied Date" value={candidate.embassyDetails?.appliedDate ? new Date(candidate.embassyDetails.appliedDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Appointment" value={candidate.embassyDetails?.appointmentDate ? new Date(candidate.embassyDetails.appointmentDate).toLocaleString() : 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="Stamp Date" value={candidate.embassyDetails?.stampDate ? new Date(candidate.embassyDetails.stampDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Result" value={candidate.embassyDetails?.stampResult || 'N/A'} isSuccess={candidate.embassyDetails?.stampResult === 'Stamped'} isAlert={candidate.embassyDetails?.stampResult === 'Rejected'} />
                        <TableRow label="Reject Reason" value={candidate.embassyDetails?.rejectReason} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Awareness Date" value={candidate.embassyDetails?.awarenessProgramDate ? new Date(candidate.embassyDetails.awarenessProgramDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="Awareness Signed" value={candidate.embassyDetails?.awarenessProgramSigned ? 'Yes' : 'No'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Visa" value={candidate.stageData?.visaStatus || 'N/A'} isSuccess={candidate.stageData?.visaStatus === 'Approved'} />
                        <TableRow label="Work Permit" value={candidate.stageData?.wpReferenceNumber || 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="USD Rate EMB" value={candidate.usdRateEmb ? `${candidate.usdRateEmb}` : 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="USD Rate F/A" value={candidate.usdRateFA ? `${candidate.usdRateFA}` : 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                </View>

                {/* 9. SLBFE & Departure */}
                <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>9. SLBFE & Departure</Text>
                <View style={styles.table}>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="SLBFE No" value={candidate.slbfeData?.registrationNumber || 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="SLBFE Reg Date" value={candidate.slbfeData?.registrationDate ? new Date(candidate.slbfeData.registrationDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Training Institute" value={candidate.slbfeData?.trainingInstitute || 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="Certificate No" value={candidate.slbfeData?.trainingCertificateNo || 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Training Date" value={candidate.slbfeData?.trainingDate ? new Date(candidate.slbfeData.trainingDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="Agreement Status" value={candidate.slbfeData?.agreementStatus} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Insurance" value={`${candidate.slbfeData?.insuranceProvider || 'N/A'} - Policy: ${candidate.slbfeData?.insurancePolicyNumber || 'N/A'}`} colSpan={3} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Insurance Expiry" value={candidate.slbfeData?.insuranceExpiryDate ? new Date(candidate.slbfeData.insuranceExpiryDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="Premium" value={candidate.slbfeData?.insurancePremium ? `LKR ${candidate.slbfeData.insurancePremium.toLocaleString()}` : 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Deployment Approval" value={candidate.slbfeData?.deploymentApprovalDate ? new Date(candidate.slbfeData.deploymentApprovalDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="Departure Date" value={candidate.departureDate ? new Date(candidate.departureDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Travel Insurance" value={`Policy: ${candidate.stageData?.travelInsurancePolicyNumber || 'N/A'}`} />
                        <TableRow label="Coverage End" value={candidate.stageData?.travelInsuranceCoverageEndDate ? new Date(candidate.stageData.travelInsuranceCoverageEndDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Flight No" value={candidate.stageData?.flightNumber || 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="Flight PNR" value={candidate.stageData?.flightPNR || 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Departure Time" value={candidate.stageData?.flightDepartureTime ? new Date(candidate.stageData.flightDepartureTime).toLocaleString() : 'N/A'} colSpan={3} isLast />
                    </View>
                </View>

            </Page>

            {/* FINANCIALS & DOCUMENTS */}
            <Page size="A4" style={styles.page}>
                <Header />
                <Footer />
                <Watermark />

                <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>10. Payments</Text>
                {candidate.advancePayments && candidate.advancePayments.length > 0 ? (
                    <View style={styles.table}>
                        <View style={[styles.tableRow, styles.tableHeader]}>
                            <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Type</Text>
                            <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Invoice</Text>
                            <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Sign Date</Text>
                            <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Amount</Text>
                            <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Informed</Text>
                            <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '25%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>Remarks</Text>
                        </View>
                        {candidate.advancePayments.map((payment: any, index: number) => (
                            <View style={styles.tableRow} key={index}>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%' }]}>{payment.type}</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%' }]}>{payment.invoiceNo || '-'}</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%' }]}>{payment.signDate ? new Date(payment.signDate).toLocaleDateString() : '-'}</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%' }]}>{payment.amount ? `LKR ${payment.amount.toLocaleString()}` : '-'}</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%' }]}>{payment.informed ? `Yes (${payment.informedDate || ''})` : 'No'}</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '25%', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>{payment.remarks || '-'}</Text>
                            </View>
                        ))}
                    </View>
                ) : (
                    <View style={styles.table}><View style={styles.tableRow}><Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '100%', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>No payments recorded.</Text></View></View>
                )}

                <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>11. Documents</Text>
                {candidate.documents && candidate.documents.length > 0 ? (
                    <View style={styles.table}>
                        <View style={[styles.tableRow, styles.tableHeader]}>
                            <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '30%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Document Type</Text>
                            <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '30%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Category</Text>
                            <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '20%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Status</Text>
                            <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '20%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>Upload Date</Text>
                        </View>
                        {candidate.documents.map((doc, index) => (
                            <React.Fragment key={index}>
                                <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '30%' }]}>{doc.type}</Text>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '30%' }]}>{doc.category}</Text>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '20%', color: doc.status === 'Rejected' ? '#dc2626' : doc.status === 'Approved' ? '#16a34a' : '#0f172a' }]}>{doc.status}</Text>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '20%', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>{doc.uploadedAt ? new Date(doc.uploadedAt).toLocaleDateString() : '-'}</Text>
                                </View>
                                {doc.status === 'Rejected' && doc.rejectionReason && (
                                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                                        <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '30%' }]}></Text>
                                        <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '70%', borderRightWidth: 0, color: '#dc2626' }]}>Reason: {doc.rejectionReason}</Text>
                                    </View>
                                )}
                            </React.Fragment>
                        ))}
                    </View>
                ) : (
                    <View style={styles.table}><View style={styles.tableRow}><Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '100%', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>No documents uploaded.</Text></View></View>
                )}

                {/* 12. Officer Notes */}
                <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>12. Officer Notes</Text>
                {candidate.comments && candidate.comments.length > 0 ? (
                    <View style={styles.table}>
                        <View style={[styles.tableRow, styles.tableHeader]}>
                            <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '20%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Timestamp</Text>
                            <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '20%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Officer</Text>
                            <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '60%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>Comment</Text>
                        </View>
                        {candidate.comments.map((comment, index) => (
                            <View style={styles.tableRow} key={index}>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '20%' }]}>{new Date(comment.timestamp).toLocaleString()}</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '20%' }]}>{comment.author}</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '60%', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>{comment.text}</Text>
                            </View>
                        ))}
                    </View>
                ) : (
                    <View style={styles.table}><View style={styles.tableRow}><Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '100%', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>No comments recorded.</Text></View></View>
                )}

                {/* 13. Activity Log */}
                <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>13. Activity Log</Text>
                {candidate.remarkLog && candidate.remarkLog.length > 0 ? (
                    <View style={styles.table}>
                        <View style={[styles.tableRow, styles.tableHeader]}>
                            <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '20%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Date</Text>
                            <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '55%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Remark</Text>
                            <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '25%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>Status</Text>
                        </View>
                        {candidate.remarkLog.map((entry, index) => (
                            <View style={styles.tableRow} key={index}>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '20%' }]}>{entry.date ? new Date(entry.date).toLocaleDateString() : '-'}</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '55%' }]}>{entry.remark}</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '25%', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>{entry.note || '-'}</Text>
                            </View>
                        ))}
                    </View>
                ) : (
                    <View style={styles.table}><View style={styles.tableRow}><Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '100%', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>No activity log entries.</Text></View></View>
                )}

            </Page>

            {/* PAGE: Milestones, Stage History, Audit */}
            <Page size="A4" style={styles.page}>
                <Header />
                <Footer />
                <Watermark />

                {/* 14. Workflow Milestones */}
                <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>14. Workflow Milestones</Text>
                <View style={styles.table}>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Offer Applied" value={candidate.workflowMilestones?.offerAppliedDate ? new Date(candidate.workflowMilestones.offerAppliedDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="Offer Received" value={candidate.workflowMilestones?.offerReceivedDate ? new Date(candidate.workflowMilestones.offerReceivedDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="WP Applied" value={candidate.workflowMilestones?.wpAppliedDate ? new Date(candidate.workflowMilestones.wpAppliedDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="WP Received" value={candidate.workflowMilestones?.wpReceivedDate ? new Date(candidate.workflowMilestones.wpReceivedDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Embassy Applied" value={candidate.workflowMilestones?.embAppliedDate ? new Date(candidate.workflowMilestones.embAppliedDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="Embassy Appt" value={candidate.workflowMilestones?.embAppointmentDate ? new Date(candidate.workflowMilestones.embAppointmentDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Stamp/Reject" value={candidate.workflowMilestones?.stampRejectDate ? new Date(candidate.workflowMilestones.stampRejectDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="Stamp Result" value={candidate.workflowMilestones?.stampResult || 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="SLBFE Training" value={candidate.workflowMilestones?.slbfeTrainingDate ? new Date(candidate.workflowMilestones.slbfeTrainingDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="SLBFE Reg" value={candidate.workflowMilestones?.slbfeRegistrationDate ? new Date(candidate.workflowMilestones.slbfeRegistrationDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Departure" value={candidate.workflowMilestones?.departureDate ? new Date(candidate.workflowMilestones.departureDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'} colSpan={3} isLast />
                    </View>
                </View>

                {/* 15. Stage History */}
                <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>15. Stage History</Text>
                {candidate.stageHistory && candidate.stageHistory.length > 0 ? (
                    <View style={styles.table}>
                        <View style={[styles.tableRow, styles.tableHeader]}>
                            <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '30%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Stage</Text>
                            <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '30%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Date</Text>
                            <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '40%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>Notes</Text>
                        </View>
                        {candidate.stageHistory.map((sh, index) => (
                            <View style={styles.tableRow} key={index}>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '30%' }]}>{sh.stage}</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '30%' }]}>{sh.timestamp ? new Date(sh.timestamp).toLocaleString() : '-'}</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '40%', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>{sh.notes || '-'}</Text>
                            </View>
                        ))}
                    </View>
                ) : (
                    <View style={styles.table}><View style={styles.tableRow}><Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '100%', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>No stage history.</Text></View></View>
                )}

                {/* 16. System Audit */}
                <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>16. System Record</Text>
                <View style={styles.table}>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Created" value={candidate.audit?.createdAt ? new Date(candidate.audit.createdAt).toLocaleString() : 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="Created By" value={candidate.audit?.createdBy} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Last Updated" value={candidate.audit?.updatedAt ? new Date(candidate.audit.updatedAt).toLocaleString() : 'N/A'} />
                        <TableRow label="Updated By" value={candidate.audit?.updatedBy} isLast />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                        <TableRow label="Version" value={candidate.audit?.version} />
                        <TableRow label="Source" value={candidate.registrationSource} isLast />
                    </View>
                    {candidate.audit?.deletedAt && (
                        <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                            <TableRow label="Deleted At" value={new Date(candidate.audit.deletedAt).toLocaleString()} colSpan={3} isAlert isLast />
                        </View>
                    )}
                </View>

                {/* 17. Multimedia & External Links */}
                {(candidate.stageData?.workingVideoLink || candidate.stageData?.selfIntroductionVideoLink || candidate.stageData?.additionalVideoLinks?.length) ? (
                    <>
                        <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>17. Multimedia & Links</Text>
                        <View style={styles.table}>
                            {candidate.stageData.selfIntroductionVideoLink && (
                                <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                                    <TableRow label="Self Intro Video" value={candidate.stageData.selfIntroductionVideoLink} colSpan={3} isLast />
                                </View>
                            )}
                            {candidate.stageData.workingVideoLink && (
                                <View style={styles.tableRow}>
                                    <TableRow label="Working Video" value={candidate.stageData.workingVideoLink} colSpan={3} isLast />
                                </View>
                            )}
                            {candidate.stageData.additionalVideoLinks?.map((link, i) => (
                                <View style={styles.tableRow} key={i}>
                                    <TableRow label={`Extra Video ${i + 1}`} value={link} colSpan={3} isLast />
                                </View>
                            ))}
                        </View>
                    </>
                ) : null}

                {/* 18. Compliance Flags */}
                {candidate.complianceFlags && candidate.complianceFlags.length > 0 ? (
                    <>
                        <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>18. Compliance Flags</Text>
                        <View style={styles.table}>
                            <View style={[styles.tableRow, styles.tableHeader]}>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Type</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Severity</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '40%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Reason</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold' }]}>Status</Text>
                                <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%', fontFamily: 'Helvetica-Bold', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>Created</Text>
                            </View>
                            {candidate.complianceFlags.map((flag, i) => (
                                <View style={styles.tableRow} key={i}>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%' }]}>{flag.type}</Text>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%', color: flag.severity === 'CRITICAL' ? '#dc2626' : '#ea580c' }]}>{flag.severity}</Text>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '40%' }]}>{flag.reason}</Text>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%', color: flag.isResolved ? '#16a34a' : '#0f172a' }]}>{flag.isResolved ? 'Resolved' : 'Active'}</Text>
                                    <Text style={[styles.gridCell, { width: '15%', borderRightWidth: 0 }]}>{new Date(flag.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}</Text>
                                </View>
                            ))}
                        </View>
                    </>
                ) : null}

                <View style={{ marginTop: 25, borderTopWidth: 1, borderTopColor: '#000000', paddingTop: 10 }}>
                    <Text style={{ fontSize: 8, fontStyle: 'italic', color: '#475569' }}>
                        This report is a system-generated extract for candidate {candidate.regNo || candidate.candidateCode}. All data is sourced from the official database records.
                    </Text>
                    <View style={{ flexDirection: 'row', marginTop: 30 }}>
                        <View style={{ width: '50%' }}>
                            <View style={{ borderBottomWidth: 1, borderBottomColor: '#000', width: 150, marginBottom: 5 }} />
                            <Text style={{ fontSize: 9 }}>Officer Signature</Text>
                            <Text style={{ fontSize: 8, color: '#64748b', marginTop: 3 }}>Date: ________________</Text>
                        </View>
                    </View>
                </View>

            </Page>
        </Document>
    );
};
